zh.lifeSummary: 當John Payne於1420年出生在英國肯特福利頓登時，他的父親John Charles Payne25歲，母親Agnes Kate Middleton23歲。他於大約1442年與Joane Webb在英國肯特福利頓登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年4月12日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Payne于1420年出生在英国肯特福利頓登时，他的父亲John Charles Payne25岁，母亲Agnes Kate Middleton23岁。他于大约1442年与Joane Webb在英国肯特福利頓登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年4月12日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Payne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

variants.name: Payn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Payne  .

variants.name: Payen
meanings: French: from the Old French personal name Pagen, Paien, from Latin Paganus, from paganus ‘country-dweller’, a derivative of pagus ‘of or relating to the countryside’, possibly given to a child not yet baptized (because of its later sense of ‘pagan, heathen’). Alternatively, a nickname for a country-born person. This surname is also found in the West Indies (mainly Haiti) and Mauritius.
English: variant of   Payne  .

variants.name: Pagan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Angel, Carlos, Rafael, Ramon, Pedro, Francisco, Jesus, Miguel, Julio.

Spanish and Catalan: Castilianized form (Pagán) of Catalan Pagà, from the Late Latin personal name Paganus, which as a derivative of Latin pagus ‘outlying village’ originally meant ‘villager’ (see Payne ). Alternatively, in some cases, a topographic name from Catalan pagà ‘heath’ (from the same Latin word pagus).
English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen, from Late Latin Paganus (see Payne , compare 1 above).

variants.name: Paynes
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Paine
meanings: English: variant of   Payne  .

History: The author of the republican treatise The Rights of Man, Thomas Paine (1737–1809), left England for North America in the mid 1770s, where he became involved in the movement that led to independence. His pamphlet of 1776, Common Sense, influenced the Declaration of Independence and furnished some of the arguments justifying it.

variants.name: Pank
meanings: English (Norfolk): perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Pank(e). It could be a shortened form of Pancok, which is probably a pet form of Pane (see Payne ).
Sorbian: nickname from a diminutive of pan ‘mister, lord, landlord’ (see Pan ). Compare Panke .

variants.name: Pane
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Salvatore, Aldo, Carmela, Carmine, Ciro, Concetta, Enzo, Giuseppe, Mario, Armando, Claudio, Macario, Remigio.

Italian: from pane ‘bread’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a baker or as a nickname meaning ‘good thing’, and also as a personal name. This surname is also found in southern France and Corsica.
English: variant of   Payne  .

variants.name: Panes
meanings: English (Somerset): variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Pannell
meanings: English (southeastern):
possibly from Middle English panel, panel(l)e ‘cloth, saddle-cloth, saddle’ or ‘pane (of glass)’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such items.
from the Middle English personal name Paynel (Old French Payenel, Latin Paganellus), a pet form of Payne (from Latin Paganus).

variants.name: Penson
meanings: English:
patronymic from the Middle English female personal name Penn, a pet form of Pernel, or perhaps from the Middle English personal name Payne + -son. See Penn , Parnell .

habitational name from Penson in North Huish (Devon), which derives from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Payn(e) (see Payne ) + Middle English toun ‘village, town, settlement’ (Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Payne was born in 1420, in Frittenden, Kent, England, his father, John Charles Payne, was 25 and his mother, Agnes Kate Middleton, was 23. He married Joane Webb about 1442, in Frittenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 12 April 1463, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Payne est né en 1420, à Frittenden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Charles Payne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Kate Middleton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joane Webb environ 1442, à Frittenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 12 avril 1463, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Payne 1420 in Frittenden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Charles Payne 25 und seine Mutter Agnes Kate Middleton 23. Er hat um 1442 in Frittenden, Kent, England Joane Webb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 12. April 1463 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Payne è nato il nel 1420 nel Frittenden, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Charles Payne, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Kate Middleton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joane Webb circa 1442, nel Frittenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 12 aprile 1463, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Boxted, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクボクステド
ja.Frittenden, Kent, England: イギリスケントフリッテンデン
ja.lifeSummary: John Payneが1420年にイギリスケントフリッテンデンで生まれた時，父John Charles Payneは25歳，母Agnes Kate Middletonは23歳であった。約1442年にイギリスケントフリッテンデンでJoane Webbと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年4月12日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Payne(이)가 1420년 영국 켄트 프리텐든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Charles Payne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Kate Middleton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1442년 영국 켄트 프리텐든에서 Joane Webb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 4월 12일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Payne nasceu em 1420, em Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Charles Payne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Kate Middleton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Webb aproximadamente 1442, em Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 12 de abril de 1463, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Payne родился в 1420 г. в местности фриттенден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Charles Payne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Kate Middleton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Webb около 1442 г. в местности фриттенден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 12 апрель 1463 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Payne nació en 1420, en Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Charles Payne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Kate Middleton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joane Webb aproximadamente 1442, en Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 12 de abril de 1463, en su pueblo.
